description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a bold, multicolored abstract pattern with dominant hues of orange, blue, black, pink, and white. The upper is constructed from synthetic materials with a glossy finish, and the shoe is equipped with white laces in a standard criss-cross pattern. The midsole and outsole are thick and sculpted, providing both cushioning and a distinctive visual profile, with the sole wrapping up onto the sides in some areas. The shoe's design includes angular and layered elements, giving it a modern, urban aesthetic. There are no visible brand logos, but the shoe's style suggests a focus on fashion and streetwear. The overall condition appears pristine, with no signs of wear or dirt.
description: A vibrant, high-top sneaker with a glossy, multicolored abstract pattern and white criss-cross laces, featuring a thick sculpted sole and modern urban design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered sole, high-top collar, and the full abstract pattern with prominent orange, blue, and black colors.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white criss-cross laces, rounded toe, and the symmetrical design of the upper and sole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same bold color scheme, sculpted sole, and high-top structure with visible heel and ankle support.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the heel structure, high collar, and the wrap-around sole design with abstract color details.
